# hdrImage

**Instance Property**

An output property that specifies the high dynamic range version of the screenshot.

## Declaration

```swift
var hdrImage: CGImage? { get set }
```

## Discussion

The output [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreGraphics/CGImage] uses the extended sRGB color space.
title: hdrImage
